#ifndef GQA_RAGGED_PREFILL_CAUSAL_H32_KV8_D128_KERNEL_H_
#define GQA_RAGGED_PREFILL_CAUSAL_H32_KV8_D128_KERNEL_H_

#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cuda_bf16.h>
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>

#define GQA_QO_HEADS 32
#define GQA_KV_HEADS 8
#define GQA_HEAD_DIM 128

// CUDA kernel launcher declaration
void launch_gqa_ragged_prefill_causal_h32_kv8_d128_kernel(
    const __nv_bfloat16* q,           // [total_q, 32, 128]
    const __nv_bfloat16* k,           // [total_kv, 8, 128]
    const __nv_bfloat16* v,           // [total_kv, 8, 128]
    const int32_t* qo_indptr,         // [len_indptr]
    const int32_t* kv_indptr,         // [len_indptr]
    int len_indptr,
    float sm_scale,
    __nv_bfloat16* output,            // [total_q, 32, 128]
    float* lse,                       // [total_q, 32]
    cudaStream_t stream);

// Host function declaration (Torch binding)
std::vector<torch::Tensor> run(
    torch::Tensor q,
    torch::Tensor k,
    torch::Tensor v,
    torch::Tensor qo_indptr,
    torch::Tensor kv_indptr,
    c10::optional<torch::Tensor> sm_scale_opt);

#endif  // GQA_RAGGED_PREFILL_CAUSAL_H32_KV8_D128_KERNEL_H_
